summary: Code complete but E2E untestable — SAP endpoint unreachable from local environment

blocker.description: SAP B1 Service Layer endpoint 195.122.19.104:50000 is unreachable from both the host machine and Docker containers. Cannot verify that prices actually flow from SAP to Magento.
